privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Grant permission to save images from the article.

versions.localizedDescription:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kyrielie/nectar/commits/v0.0.1

Installation
- Unsigned ipa, must be sideloaded. Either use altstore or sideloadly. Altstore is safer. 

Features
- Displays metadata to JSON feed items from Ambrosia. Description, fandom, rating, warnings, category.
- Adjustable timeline display, variable size cards and details.
- Saves reading progress, reading progress bar in timeline.
- New smart feed for loved books.
- Swipe gestures toggle.
- Full screen reading.
- Theme overrides, font, color and line height.
- Syncing based on ao3 id, allows for duplicate items across feeds.
- Sort by word count, author, title, and publish/update date.
